creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
This fails to patch:

===>  Patching for libgnomesu-2.0.2
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for libgnomesu-2.0.2
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to src/gnomesu-auth-dialog.c.rej
=> FreeBSD patch patch-src_gnomesu-auth-dialog.c failed to apply cleanly.
*** Error code 1

The failing patch be deleted?
